description:
Toggle

Description:
Toggle UI element.

Usage:

Attach Custom Component to a Scene Object under the Orthographic Camera.

API:

switch(): void - animated switches the toggle if interactions are allowed.

on(): void - animated switches to the "On" state. Allows interactions if this option was disabled.

off(): void - animated switches to the "Off" state. Allows interactions if this option was disabled.

enableInteractable(): void - enables Interactable and invokes animations for the new toggle's state.

disableInteractable(): void - Disables Interactable and invokes animations for the disabled state.

enableButton(): void - enables the Button's image.

disableButton(): void - disables the Button's image.

enableIcon(): void - enables the Icon's image. The icon is the foreground texture for the toggle button.

disableIcon(): void - disables Icon's image. The icon is the foreground texture for the toggle button.

(read-only) effectiveState: string - the effective toggle state: "On" or "Off". Providing clarity on what the state of the toggle would be if it were enabled.

toggleState: string - the current toggle state: "On", "Off" or "Disabled".

anchorOn: number - anchor position (x) of the button in the "On" state.

anchorOff: number - anchor position (x) of the button in the "Off" state.

anchorDisabled: number - anchor position (x) of the button in the "Disable" state.
iconOn: Texture - icon's texture of the button in the "On" state.

iconOff: Texture - icon's texture of the button in the "Off" state.

iconDisabled: Texture - icon's texture of the button in the "Disable" state.

backgroundColorOn: vec4 - color of the background in the "On" state.

backgroundColorOff: vec4 - color of the background in the "Off" state.

backgroundColorDisabled: vec4 - color of the background in the "Disable" state.

buttonColorOn: vec4 - color of the background in the "On" state.

buttonColorOff: vec4 - color of the button in the "Off" state.

buttonColorDisabled: vec4 - color of the button in the "Disable" state.

API Events:

onState - triggers when the toggle switches to the "On" state.

offState - triggers when the toggle switches to the "Off" state.

stateChanged - triggers when the toggle changes its state.

onTouchStart - triggers when starts touching on the toggle.

onTouchMove - triggers when touching moves on the toggle.

onTouchEnd - triggers when ends touching on the toggle.

onEnabledInteractable - triggers when the toggle becomes interactable.

onDisabledInteractable - triggers when the toggle becomes non-interactable.
name: Toggle
